metadata.description: EstreGenesis self-hosted Claude Code plugin marketplace. Currently ships Constellation (live multi-agent orchestration with MCP integration) and Superscalar (execution-scheduling discipline) as Phase 1 prototype plugins. Plugins are Apache-2.0 licensed; the marketplace mirrors the EG repo's main branch.

plugins.name: constellation
plugins.description: Live multi-agent orchestration client for Claude Code. Connects to a separately-running Constellation WebSocket server (user-provisioned; canonical reference impl at constellation/reference/runtime/server.cjs in this repo). MCP server exposes 5 tools (board_state_get / board_history_tail / agent_list_get / a2a_emit / a2a_wait_ack), 3 skills, and a Stop hook bundling pre-send-probe.cjs. Without a running WS server the plugin loads cleanly and degrades gracefully (skills are documentation-only, hook logs cleanly). v0.2.1: hook script self-contained for community-marketplace compatibility. v0.2.2: probe ALLOWLIST extended (Request/Reply/Attachment/ArtifactManifest/ArtifactComplete) + inner-name fallback for doubly-wrapped CUSTOM envelopes. v0.2.3: Infrastructure-requirements section added prominently at top of README per community-marketplace submission readiness review. npm dep: ws ^8.18.0.

plugins.name: superscalar
plugins.description: Execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch: issue_width formula (effort_band + pace_mode + Little's Law + Kanban WIP + autonomy_available_workers) + worktree-isolated reorder buffer + cost-benefit gate + opt-in speculation + adoption thresholds. Plugin v0.1.0 wraps Superscalar.md v0.4 as a model-invoked skill the agent consults before fan-out decisions.
